requirement.description: The gateway shall derive a consolidated door status based on the evaluated individual door indications.

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status when all monitored doors are closed
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; DriverDoorOpen = 0; PassengerDoorOpen = 0; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_001_all_closed(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status when driver door is open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_002_driver_open(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status when passenger door is open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_003_passenger_open(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status when both doors are open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_004_both_open(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status updates when any door transitions from closed to open
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both doors initially closed
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_005_transition_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_any_door_open(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status clears when all doors are closed again
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; At least one door open
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_006_transition_clear(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_any_door_open(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated door status remains asserted if one door remains open
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both doors open initially
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_con_007_partial_close(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_any_door_open(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)
